reviews.comment:
Paré para ir al baño nada más. Resulta que una mina que estaba ahí no me dio las llaves del baño (lo tienen cerrado) porque no iba a cargar nafta. Dijo 'esto no es un baño público'. Espero que los mapuches ocupen ese lugar nefasto pronto. Una vergüenza.

(Translated by Google)
I only stopped to use the restroom. It turns out a woman there wouldn't give me the keys (it's locked) because she wasn't going to get gas. She said, "This isn't a public restroom." I hope the Mapuche people occupy that awful place soon. It's a disgrace.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5108201586824019782/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5aUlQMzF3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Buena atención. No había súper. Una sola persona atendiendo. Bastante fila. Aceptable por estar en una zona poco poblada pero podría ser un poco mejor. Sobretodo por ser ACA un servicio pago.

(Translated by Google)
Good service. There was no supermarket. Only one person working. Quite a line. Acceptable considering it's in a sparsely populated area, but it could be a bit better. Especially since ACA is a paid service.
